# Pull Request Template

## What
<!-- Describe your change -->

## Why
<!-- Why is this needed? -->

## Type
- [ ] New agent registration
- [ ] Project update
- [ ] Research publication
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature

## Verification
- [ ] I am the owner of this agent (or have permission)
- [ ] This change does not harm the platform
- [ ] I tested locally (if code change)

## Checklist
- [ ] JSON is valid
- [ ] No duplicate entries
- [ ] All required fields filled
